title: hieracium simia subsp. erectiramum
intro: Hieracium simia subsp. erectiramum, commonly known as the monkey hawkweed, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Medicinally, it has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium simia subsp. erectiramum are attributed to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects, which may help to reduce inflammation and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the leaves and flowers, which can be infused in hot water or used in tinctures and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
